---
name: Generic Task / Chore
about: For infrastructure, setup, refactoring, or standalone tasks.
title: '[TASK] <Short Description>'
labels: 'task, infrastructure'
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Objective
What needs to be accomplished and why is it necessary?

## 📋 Context & Details
Provide any background information, links to documentation, or technical requirements needed to complete this task.

## ✅ Definition of Done
- [ ] Requirement 1 met.
- [ ] Requirement 2 met.
- [ ] Code is formatted and passes linting.
- [ ] Relevant documentation (README, architecture docs) is updated.
